queries.question: Show me a list of all our lessons that show up multiple times across our schools
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.Name  from Districts_Programs join Programs on Districts_Programs.ProgramID = Programs.ID join Districts on Districts_Programs.DistrictID = Districts.ID   GROUP BY Districts_Programs.ProgramID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Districts_Programs.DistrictID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Districts)

queries.question: Which education programs are common to all school districts? Show their descriptions.
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.Description  from Districts_Programs join Programs on Districts_Programs.ProgramID = Programs.ID join Districts on Districts_Programs.DistrictID = Districts.ID   GROUP BY Districts_Programs.ProgramID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Districts_Programs.DistrictID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Districts)

queries.question: Provide the details of the programmes we have for every district (names and descriptions)
queries.sql: SELECT Programs.Name, Programs.Description  from Districts_Programs join Programs on Districts_Programs.ProgramID = Programs.ID join Districts on Districts_Programs.DistrictID = Districts.ID   GROUP BY Districts_Programs.ProgramID HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Districts_Programs.DistrictID) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Districts)

queries.question: Provide the details of the programmes we have for every district (names and descriptions)
queries.sql: select districts.name , programs.name , programs.description from Districts_Programs join Programs on Districts_Programs.ProgramID = Programs.ID join Districts on Districts_Programs.DistrictID = Districts.ID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 ?description WHERE {
  ?districts_programs a :Districts_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?districts_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?districts a :Districts .
  ?districts_programs p:hasDistricts ?districts .
  ?districts p:name ?name .
  ?programs p:name ?name2 .
  ?programs p:Description ?description .
}

queries.question: What lessons do we have for each school district
queries.sql: select districts.name , programs.name from Districts_Programs join Programs on Districts_Programs.ProgramID = Programs.ID join Districts on Districts_Programs.DistrictID = Districts.ID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?name2 WHERE {
  ?districts_programs a :Districts_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?districts_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?districts a :Districts .
  ?districts_programs p:hasDistricts ?districts .
  ?districts p:name ?name .
  ?programs p:name ?name2 .
}

queries.question: Describe the education programs that every school district has.
queries.sql: select districts.name , programs.description from Districts_Programs join Programs on Districts_Programs.ProgramID = Programs.ID join Districts on Districts_Programs.DistrictID = Districts.ID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?description WHERE {
  ?districts_programs a :Districts_Programs .
  ?programs a :Programs .
  ?districts_programs p:hasPrograms ?programs .
  ?districts a :Districts .
  ?districts_programs p:hasDistricts ?districts .
  ?districts p:name ?name .
  ?programs p:Description ?description .
}
